name: Roblox Studio MCP Server
what_it_does: Roblox Studio MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Roblox Studio — reading and modifying game world objects, executing Lua scripts, querying game hierarchy, managing game assets, and integrating AI assistance into Roblox game development workflows for creating and modifying Roblox experiences.
use_cases: Reading and modifying Roblox game world objects from game development agents
Executing Lua scripts in Roblox Studio from scripting agents
Querying and managing game hierarchy from level design agents
Automating Roblox game asset management from content agents
AI-assisted Roblox Lua scripting from pair programming agents
Generating Roblox game content from natural language from creative agents
not_for: Non-Roblox game development (Unity, Godot, Unreal require different MCPs)
Roblox player-side automation (Studio-only, not for playing games)
best_when: A Roblox developer needs AI assistance within Roblox Studio — creating game objects, writing Lua scripts, and automating game development tasks.
avoid_when: You're developing outside Roblox or using other game engines.

auth.notes: No authentication — local MCP communicating with Roblox Studio via plugin/RPC. Roblox Studio must be running with plugin installed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Roblox Studio is free to use
pricing.paid_tiers: Roblox Premium for additional platform features
pricing.notes: Roblox Studio is free. MCP server plugin is free open source. Roblox Creator account required.

performance.rate_limits: Local Studio communication — no external rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: Roblox Studio must be running with the plugin installed — specific setup required
Roblox Creator account required — cannot use without account
Lua API knowledge specific to Roblox's version of Luau required
Game hierarchy can be complex — agents need Roblox game structure knowledge
Community MCP from boshyxd — limited official Roblox support
Studio API may change with Roblox updates — check compatibility
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local Studio plugin. Roblox account required. Community MCP. Game data is local — no external exposure. COPPA applies for Roblox platform usage.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local Studio plugin. No credentials for MCP. Roblox account needed. Community MCP. COPPA compliance for Roblox platform.
